case_title: POON, JANE vs. BLANCO, ELSA E. et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT BLANCO, ELSA E. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANCO, ELSA E. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3527 18TH ST, #2, STAYED UNTIL NOV-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT SHALL ISSUE, BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL 15-NOV-94, PLTF. SHALL FORGIVE SUM OF $1650.00 RENTS AND DAMAGES IF DEFT. VACATES PREMISES; PLTF. TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT; EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
